# Copilot Prompt Creator

Follow the instructions in [SKILL.md](../../SKILL.md) to help the user create, test, and improve GitHub Copilot customizations.

This prompt file loads the full workflow guide which covers:
- Capturing user intent and interviewing for requirements
- Writing `.prompt.md` files, `.instructions.md` files, and Agent Skills with proper frontmatter
- Setting up test cases and evaluation workflows
- Iteratively improving prompts based on user feedback
- Using the eval viewer for qualitative and quantitative review
